introduction.p: You hail a taxi and can only pay with cash. This cab service charges a flat fee of {\$20.00} and then charges {\$3.50} per mile. No tip is expected. You are carrying a total of {\$146.00} in cash with you. You want to know how many miles you can afford.

statement.p: Write an inequality to represent this situation, using x to represent how many miles you can afford.
Solve this inequality. At most how many miles can you afford?
Use interval notation to express the number of miles you might ride that day.
